requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — EAEU Energy-Efficiency Requirements for Household Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能效——EAEU家用制冷器具能效要求
requirement_topic.zht: 能效——EAEU家用製冷器具能效要求

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Kazakhstan market are subject to EAEU energy-efficiency requirements. Energy efficiency of energy-consuming devices in the Eurasian Economic Union is addressed through the EAEU energy-efficiency framework （including the EAEU technical regulation on energy efficiency of energy-consuming devices） and the supporting GOST standards for measuring refrigerator energy consumption （GOST IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods）. Appliances must meet the applicable energy-efficiency class threshold and the energy consumption must be measured to the harmonised GOST test methods. Conformity is demonstrated within the EAEU conformity-assessment system and the energy-efficiency class is shown on the EAEU energy-efficiency label affixed to the appliance and shown at point of sale （see row frigkz-energy-002）. The EAEU energy-efficiency class scale and calculation basis differ from China's GB 12021.2 grade, so a Chinese grade does not automatically map to an EAEU class.
summary.zh: 投放哈萨克斯坦市场的家用制冷器具须符合EAEU能效要求。欧亚经济联盟耗能设备的能效通过EAEU能效框架（包括关于耗能设备能效的EAEU技术法规）及配套的电冰箱能耗测量GOST标准（GOST IEC 62552系列——《家用制冷器具——特性和试验方法》）管控。器具须达到适用的能效等级门槛，且能耗须按协调的GOST试验方法测量。合格性在EAEU合格评定体系内证明，能效等级在加贴于器具并在销售点展示的EAEU能效标签上显示（见frigkz-energy-002行）。EAEU能效等级体系及计算基准与中国GB 12021.2等级不同，因此中国等级不自动对应于EAEU等级。
summary.zht: 投放哈薩克市場的家用製冷器具須符合EAEU能效要求。歐亞經濟聯盟耗能設備的能效通過EAEU能效框架（包括關於耗能設備能效的EAEU技術法規）及配套的電冰箱能耗測量GOST標準（GOST IEC 62552系列——《家用製冷器具——特性和試驗方法》）管控。器具須達到適用的能效等級門檻，且能耗須按協調的GOST試驗方法測量。合格性在EAEU合格評定體系內證明，能效等級在加貼於器具並在銷售點展示的EAEU能效標籤上顯示（見frigkz-energy-002行）。EAEU能效等級體系及計算基準與中國GB 12021.2等級不同，因此中國等級不自動對應於EAEU等級。

standards_or_laws: EAEU energy-efficiency framework for energy-consuming devices (EAEU technical regulation / Eurasian Economic Commission requirements on energy efficiency)
GOST IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (harmonised measurement standards for energy efficiency)
EAEU energy-efficiency label requirement (see row frigkz-energy-002)

summary.en: China's mandatory energy-efficiency standard for household refrigerating appliances is GB 12021.2-2015 （Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators）, establishing grades （Grade 1 most efficient, Grade 5 minimum threshold） and minimum annual energy consumption limits. It is mandatory and enforced by SAMR under the China Energy Label system administered by the NDRC; products must display the China Energy Label before sale. The GB 12021.2 grade framework and test basis differ from the EAEU energy-efficiency class methodology — Chinese grades and EAEU energy-efficiency classes are not directly comparable and a re-evaluation to EAEU methodology is required.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的强制性能效标准为GB 12021.2-2015（《家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级》），规定了能效等级（1级最高效，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量最低限值。该标准为强制性，由市场监管总局（SAMR）在NDRC管理的中国能效标识制度下执行；产品在销售前须展示中国能效标识。GB 12021.2等级框架及试验基础与EAEU能效等级方法不同——中国等级与EAEU能效等级不可直接比较，须按EAEU方法重新评定。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的強制性能效標準為GB 12021.2-2015（《家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級》），規定了能效等級（1級最高效，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量最低限值。該標準為強制性，由市場監管總局（SAMR）在NDRC管理的中國能效標識制度下執行；產品在銷售前須展示中國能效標識。GB 12021.2等級框架及試驗基礎與EAEU能效等級方法不同——中國等級與EAEU能效等級不可直接比較，須按EAEU方法重新評定。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory; enforced by SAMR/NDRC under China Energy Label system)
GB/T 8059-2016 — Household and similar refrigerating appliances (test method standard, aligned with IEC 62552 series)

gap.en: Two gaps exist between Chinese energy compliance and EAEU energy-efficiency requirements: (1) Different class basis — the EAEU energy-efficiency class is calculated on EAEU methodology, while GB 12021.2-2015 uses a 1-to-5 grade framework. A Chinese Grade 1 or Grade 2 rating does not guarantee the equivalent EAEU energy-efficiency class without re-evaluation; energy consumption must be measured to the GOST IEC 62552 series accepted in the EAEU. (2) Documentation and label — the EAEU energy-efficiency class must be established for the model and shown on the EAEU energy-efficiency label （see frigkz-energy-002）; the Chinese China Energy Label cannot serve as the EAEU label. Because the 220/380 V 50 Hz grid matches China, the appliance's electrical operating point is unchanged, but the energy-consumption figures must still be re-expressed under the EAEU class system.
gap.zh: 中国能效合规与EAEU能效要求之间存在两项差距：（1）等级基准不同——EAEU能效等级按EAEU方法计算，而GB 12021.2-2015采用1至5级框架。中国1级或2级评定不等同于EAEU能效等级，须重新评定；能耗须按EAEU接受的GOST IEC 62552系列测量。（2）文件和标签——须为型号确定EAEU能效等级并在EAEU能效标签上显示（见frigkz-energy-002）；中国能效标识不能充当EAEU标签。由于220/380 V 50 Hz电网与中国一致，器具的电气工作点不变，但能耗数据仍须按EAEU等级体系重新表述。
gap.zht: 中國能效合規與EAEU能效要求之間存在兩項差距：（1）等級基準不同——EAEU能效等級按EAEU方法計算，而GB 12021.2-2015採用1至5級框架。中國1級或2級評定不等同於EAEU能效等級，須重新評定；能耗須按EAEU接受的GOST IEC 62552系列測量。（2）文件和標籤——須為型號確定EAEU能效等級並在EAEU能效標籤上顯示（見frigkz-energy-002）；中國能效標識不能充當EAEU標籤。由於220/380 V 50 Hz電網與中國一致，器具的電氣工作點不變，但能耗數據仍須按EAEU等級體系重新表述。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EAEU energy-efficiency requirements and the energy-efficiency label apply to household refrigerating appliances before placement on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market; energy consumption measured to GOST IEC 62552 series
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2-2015 energy efficiency grade compliance and China Energy Label display required before sale in China; administered by SAMR/NDRC

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EAEU energy-efficiency requirements are mandatory for household refrigerators placed on the Kazakhstan market. Chinese GB 12021.2 grades do not substitute for the EAEU energy-efficiency class — energy consumption must be measured to the GOST IEC 62552 series and the EAEU class established. The Chinese China Energy Label does not satisfy EAEU labelling; the EAEU energy-efficiency label is required (see frigkz-energy-002).
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAEU能效要求对投放哈萨克斯坦市场的家用电冰箱具有强制性。中国GB 12021.2等级不能替代EAEU能效等级——能耗须按GOST IEC 62552系列测量并确定EAEU等级。中国能效标识不满足EAEU标识要求；须使用EAEU能效标签（见frigkz-energy-002）。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAEU能效要求對投放哈薩克市場的家用電冰箱具有強制性。中國GB 12021.2等級不能替代EAEU能效等級——能耗須按GOST IEC 62552系列測量並確定EAEU等級。中國能效標識不滿足EAEU標識要求；須使用EAEU能效標籤（見frigkz-energy-002）。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — EAEU Energy-Efficiency Label for Household Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标识——EAEU家用制冷器具能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標識——EAEU家用製冷器具能效標籤

summary.en: Household refrigerating appliances placed on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market must bear the EAEU energy-efficiency label displaying the energy-efficiency class, the annual energy consumption （kWh/annum）, and the principal product parameters （such as compartment volumes and, where applicable, noise level）, in accordance with the EAEU requirements on energy-efficiency labelling of energy-consuming devices. The label content and format are set by the EAEU framework and the supporting GOST standards; the class shown must correspond to energy consumption measured to the GOST IEC 62552 series. The label and accompanying information must be presented in Russian （and Kazakh where required） and the label must be available at point of sale and in commercial listings. The supplier / importer established in the EAEU is responsible for ensuring the correct class is declared and the label is affixed.
summary.zh: 投放哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场的家用制冷器具须附贴EAEU能效标签，按照EAEU关于耗能设备能效标识的要求，标注能效等级、年耗电量（千瓦时／年）及主要产品参数（如隔间容积，必要时含噪声值）。标签内容和格式由EAEU框架及配套GOST标准规定；所示等级须与按GOST IEC 62552系列测量的能耗对应。标签及随附信息须以俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）呈现，且标签须在销售点及商业列表中可获取。在EAEU境内设立的供应商／进口商负责确保正确声明等级并加贴标签。
summary.zht: 投放哈薩克／EAEU市場的家用製冷器具須附貼EAEU能效標籤，按照EAEU關於耗能設備能效標識的要求，標注能效等級、年耗電量（千瓦時／年）及主要產品參數（如隔間容積，必要時含噪聲值）。標籤內容和格式由EAEU框架及配套GOST標準規定；所示等級須與按GOST IEC 62552系列測量的能耗對應。標籤及隨附資訊須以俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）呈現，且標籤須在銷售點及商業列表中可獲取。在EAEU境內設立的供應商／進口商負責確保正確聲明等級並加貼標籤。

standards_or_laws: EAEU requirements on energy-efficiency labelling of energy-consuming devices (Eurasian Economic Commission)
GOST IEC 62552 series — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods (basis for the declared energy consumption and class)
EAEU energy-efficiency class framework (see row frigkz-energy-001)

summary.en: China's energy labelling for household refrigerators is the China Energy Label （CEL） system under the Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels （NDRC/SAMR, revised 2016）. The China Energy Label displays a 1-to-5 grade scale （1 highest, 5 minimum threshold） and annual energy consumption, administered through the China National Institute of Standardization （CNIS） under NDRC/SAMR; manufacturers self-declare the grade based on GB 12021.2 testing. The CEL format, grade scale, and language differ from the EAEU energy-efficiency label and the Chinese label cannot serve as the EAEU label without re-evaluation and re-issuance in Russian under the EAEU class system.
summary.zh: 中国家用电冰箱的能效标识为《能源效率标识管理办法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修订）下的中国能效标识（CEL）体系。中国能效标识展示1至5级评级（1级最高，5级为最低门槛）及年耗电量，由NDRC/SAMR下属的中国标准化研究院（CNIS）管理；制造商依据GB 12021.2检测自我声明等级。CEL的格式、等级体系及语言与EAEU能效标签不同，中国标识未经按EAEU等级体系以俄语重新评定和重新签发，不能充当EAEU标签。
summary.zht: 中國家用電冰箱的能效標識為《能源效率標識管理辦法》（NDRC/SAMR，2016年修訂）下的中國能效標識（CEL）體系。中國能效標識展示1至5級評級（1級最高，5級為最低門檻）及年耗電量，由NDRC/SAMR下屬的中國標準化研究院（CNIS）管理；製造商依據GB 12021.2檢測自我聲明等級。CEL的格式、等級體系及語言與EAEU能效標籤不同，中國標識未經按EAEU等級體系以俄語重新評定和重新簽發，不能充當EAEU標籤。

standards_or_laws: Measures for the Administration of Energy Efficiency Labels (NDRC/SAMR 2016 revision) — China Energy Label framework
GB 12021.2-2015 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (underlying grade standard)

gap.en: The Chinese China Energy Label cannot be used as the EAEU energy-efficiency label: (1) Class basis and scale differ — the EAEU energy-efficiency class must be established for the model, while the CEL shows a 1-to-5 grade; the figures must be re-expressed under EAEU methodology and consumption measured to the GOST IEC 62552 series; (2) Language and format — the EAEU label and accompanying information must be in Russian （and Kazakh where required） and follow the EAEU label format; (3) Responsibility — the EAEU-established supplier / importer must ensure the correct class is declared and the label affixed at point of sale and in commercial listings. There is no cross-recognition between the China Energy Label and the EAEU energy-efficiency label.
gap.zh: 中国能效标识不能用作EAEU能效标签：（1）等级基准和体系不同——须为型号确定EAEU能效等级，而CEL展示1至5级；数据须按EAEU方法重新表述，能耗须按GOST IEC 62552系列测量；（2）语言和格式——EAEU标签及随附信息须为俄语（必要时含哈萨克语）并遵循EAEU标签格式；（3）责任——在EAEU境内设立的供应商／进口商须确保正确声明等级并在销售点及商业列表中加贴标签。中国能效标识与EAEU能效标签之间不存在相互承认。
gap.zht: 中國能效標識不能用作EAEU能效標籤：（1）等級基準和體系不同——須為型號確定EAEU能效等級，而CEL展示1至5級；數據須按EAEU方法重新表述，能耗須按GOST IEC 62552系列測量；（2）語言和格式——EAEU標籤及隨附資訊須為俄語（必要時含哈薩克語）並遵循EAEU標籤格式；（3）責任——在EAEU境內設立的供應商／進口商須確保正確聲明等級並在銷售點及商業列表中加貼標籤。中國能效標識與EAEU能效標籤之間不存在相互承認。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — the EAEU energy-efficiency label must be affixed and shown at point of sale before placing household refrigerators on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market; class based on GOST IEC 62552 series measurements
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label display required before sale in China under NDRC/SAMR Measures; based on GB 12021.2-2015

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The EAEU energy-efficiency label is a mandatory requirement for household refrigerators on the Kazakhstan / EAEU market. The Chinese China Energy Label does not satisfy this obligation — the model's energy consumption must be measured to the GOST IEC 62552 series, the EAEU energy-efficiency class established, and a Russian-language EAEU label affixed and shown at point of sale by the EAEU-established supplier or importer.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] EAEU能效标签是哈萨克斯坦／EAEU市场家用电冰箱的强制要求。中国能效标识不满足此义务——须按GOST IEC 62552系列测量型号能耗，确定EAEU能效等级，并由EAEU境内设立的供应商或进口商加贴俄语EAEU标签并在销售点展示。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] EAEU能效標籤是哈薩克／EAEU市場家用電冰箱的強制要求。中國能效標識不滿足此義務——須按GOST IEC 62552系列測量型號能耗，確定EAEU能效等級，並由EAEU境內設立的供應商或進口商加貼俄語EAEU標籤並在銷售點展示。
